hero.headline: Be Your Own
hero.description: We create experiences beyond the classroom — into the real world through adventure, culture, and hands-on learning.

preview.title: Every experience is designed to help you grow through doing
preview.schoolsDescription: Custom local and international programs for primary through secondary schools — built around your learning objectives and group size.

abdul.name: Abdul Explorer
abdul.credential: First Saudi to ski to the North Pole
abdul.tagline: If I can, You Can, We All Can.
abdul.description: Camp Explorer carries the same mindset Abdul brought to standing on top of the world — that growth lives at the edge of comfort.

closingCta.title: Ready to step out of your comfort zone?
closingCta.description: This is more than an experience. This is where growth begins.
